code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
mut line = ""
match line_opt
when Some(s)
  line = s
when None
  line = ""
end

mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  mut b = 0
  match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let parsed = string.parse_int(current)
      match parsed
      when Some(v)
        tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  let parsed = string.parse_int(current)
  match parsed
  when Some(v)
    tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let total = tokens.len()
mut out = ""
mut j = total - 1
while j >= 0
  let v_opt = tokens.get(j)
  match v_opt
  when Some(v)
    if string.is_empty(out)
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j - 1
end
println(out)
